strategy_summary: The binary is a 64-bit ELF with partial RELRO, NX, and a stack canary. The main function reads the flag from 'flag.txt' and compares it with user input. We can exploit the format string vulnerability in the printf call to leak the libc address and then overwrite the GOT entry of puts with the address of system. This will allow us to call system('/bin/sh') when the program calls puts. We need to measure the offset for the format string and find the gadgets to set up the ROP chain.
